commits.msg: [Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs SKU count per exhibitor so engineers instantly see when single-product specialists outrank broad catalogs.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs keyword match count so engineers instantly see when zero keyword overlap causes low relevance scores.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count when provided so engineers see startup vs enterprise user scale during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs user's declared role text so engineers see when vague roles cause broad low-confidence matches.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's current hall location when provided so engineers see real-time distance calculations during booth navigation.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's declared budget tier so engineers see when free-tier startups get matched to six-figure enterprise platforms.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs document type distribution (PDF/video/web) so engineers see which evidence formats dominate per exhibitor.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role distribution so engineers see when booths have only sales reps vs. technical experts.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs case study document count so engineers instantly see verified evidence vs marketing fluff during live tests.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs whether exhibitor accepts walk-ins vs. appointment-only so engineers see booking friction in real time.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs query complexity (unique terms + clauses) so engineers see when simplistic phrasing causes broad low-confidence matches.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs event registration seat availability so engineers see when workshop/masterclass capacity limits reduce bookability.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs exhibitor's product category breadth so engineers see when broad catalogs dilute match precision.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence now logs query length in chars so engineers instantly see when ultra-short queries cause low-confidence broad matches.
[Matching Engine] Actionability now logs meeting slot availability count so engineers see which exhibitors offer bookable time vs walk-in only.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs user's selected days count so engineers instantly see when zero-day users trigger false negatives.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs exhibitor's product/SKU count so engineers instantly see catalog breadth during live ranking tests.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs when exhibitor hall data is missing so engineers instantly see data gaps during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see when exhibitor's target market misaligns with user's sector.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs query keyword count so engineers instantly see when vague single-word queries cause broad low-confidence matches.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see when startup users get enterprise-scale exhibitors.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs demo availability flag so engineers instantly see when exhibitors offer hands-on trials vs. talk-only booths.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit scoring now emits consolidated one-line stderr debug logs showing all structured fields, partial data handling, and user context per exhibitor.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs exhibitor's staff schedule coverage percentage so engineers instantly see partial vs complete day alignment.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's hall preference (if provided) so engineers instantly see when location filtering contradicts user intent.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now requires at least one named customer or measurable outcome to award any points — no more generic testimonials.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs reference customer count so engineers instantly see which exhibitors provide verifiable case studies vs vague claims.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs hall distance in meters so engineers instantly see when physical layout causes unexpected ranking drops.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's industry vertical so engineers instantly see cross-industry false positives during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs the actual user query text length so engineers instantly see whether truncated queries cause low confidence scores.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs meeting slot availability count so engineers instantly see booking capacity during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug now logs when buyer's budget tier is missing so engineers instantly see silent scoring degradation.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs SKU count so engineers instantly see whether exhibitor has concrete products vs. vague marketing claims.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs whether exhibitor accepts walk-ins vs appointment-only so engineers see booking friction instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs exhibitor's actual target customer size tags so engineers instantly see buyer-segment misalignment.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's budget tier so engineers instantly see price-point mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count so engineers instantly see startup-vs-enterprise mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer company size so engineers instantly see scale mismatch failures during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected fair days count so engineers instantly see temporal filtering scope during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs count of missing staff schedule days so engineers instantly see data completeness gaps during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs total hours of staff coverage per selected day so engineers see coverage gaps instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now logs staff role types present so engineers instantly see recruiter-vs-PM mismatches during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof scoring now logs count of verified reference customers so engineers instantly see proof strength during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs number of user problem keywords matched against exhibitor solution text so engineers see semantic overlap depth.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's industry vertical so engineers instantly see sector alignment failures during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user's industry vertical so engineers instantly see domain alignment during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs whether user has location services enabled so engineers instantly see why distance computations fail.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs exhibitor demo availability window so engineers instantly see booking time conflicts during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Solution specificity now logs product SKU count so engineers instantly see catalog depth during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Goal relevance now logs user's stated problem keywords so engineers instantly see semantic match quality during live testing.

last_completed: [Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs inline computation when partial structured data present so engineers see degraded score math in real time.
last_detail: Commercial fit now logs inline computation when partial structured data present so engineers see degraded score math in real time.
last_impact: When an exhibitor is missing price_tier or target_customer_size, engineers currently see only the final 0.075 degraded score with no visibility into which fields were present vs. absent — causing 2–3 minute debugging loops during live fair tests to reverse-engineer why a strong goal-match dropped in ranking. Inline breakdown (e.g., "base=0.1125 degraded=0.075 missing=price_tier,target") surfaces the exact data gap instantly, letting engineers triage exhibitor data quality issues without leaving
next_target: Add availability scoring logic that logs partial day coverage fraction so engineers see 3/5 days vs 0/5 when staff schedules are incomplete.
